Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories
Off Calendar Sep-10-2013 Continued To Sep-24-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT ROGER EAGLETON, WEILI WANG and FIVE STAR PROPERTY MANAGEMENT's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories is continued to September 24, 2013 at 9 am to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 10, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposing papers. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties by 4pm stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. Judge Pro Tem Elizabeth L. Riley, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
